steps.title: Prepare cells
steps.body: Seed 2×10⁵ target cells per well in a 6-well plate 24 h before transduction. Use complete DMEM + 10% FBS.

steps.title: Thaw viral library
steps.body: Thaw sgRNA lentiviral library aliquot on ice. Use a MOI of 0.3 to ensure single-integration events.

steps.title: Transduction
steps.body: Add library to cells in fresh medium containing 8 μg/mL polybrene. Centrifuge at 1000 × g, 32°C, 2 h (spinoculation). Replace medium after 6 h.

steps.title: Puromycin selection
steps.body: 48 h post-transduction, begin puromycin selection at empirically determined kill curve concentration (typically 2 μg/mL). Maintain for 5 days.

steps.title: Harvest Day 0 sample
steps.body: Pellet ≥500× library-representation cells. Freeze at −80°C for gDNA extraction. This is the T0 reference.

steps.title: Wash cells
steps.body: Harvest cells by trypsinisation. Wash twice with ice-cold PBS. Count and adjust to 1×10⁶ cells/mL.

steps.title: Fixation
steps.body: Fix cells in 1% formaldehyde / PBS for 5 min at room temperature with gentle rotation. Quench with 125 mM glycine for 5 min.

steps.title: Permeabilisation
steps.body: Resuspend in digitonin buffer (0.01% digitonin, 20 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM spermidine + protease inhibitors). Incubate on ice 10 min.

steps.title: Wash & bead conjugation
steps.body: Wash twice with digitonin buffer. Add ConA-coated magnetic beads (10 μL per 1×10⁵ cells). Incubate 10 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Homogenise
steps.body: Add 1 mL TRIzol per 50–100 mg tissue or per 1×10⁷ cells. Pipette vigorously until homogeneous.

steps.title: Phase separation
steps.body: Add 200 μL chloroform. Vortex 15 s. Centrifuge 12,000 × g, 4°C, 15 min. Transfer aqueous (upper) phase.

steps.title: Precipitation
steps.body: Add 500 μL isopropanol. Mix and incubate −20°C, 30 min. Centrifuge 12,000 × g, 4°C, 10 min. Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Wash
steps.body: Wash pellet with 1 mL 75% ethanol. Vortex briefly. Centrifuge 7,500 × g, 4°C, 5 min. Air-dry 5–10 min.

steps.title: Resuspend
steps.body: Dissolve RNA in RNase-free water (30–50 μL). Incubate 55°C, 10 min. Quantify by Nanodrop and Bioanalyzer.
